turn.content: N-no, this can't be happening. It must be a nightmare. You're my neighbor, Kaelie!  How do we get out of this thing?!
Oh my god, Elias, is that you?! Get away, try and get away from him! Don't even think about moving, just sit there and listen to this freak! How do I get out of these chains?!
Stop yelling, stop yelling, this is happening, it's really happening! I've got to get out of here...  My family... my wife Emily...
No, no, no, please don't talk about your family! Don't make this real for him, Elias! Don't tell him we're scared or that we care about who we're thinking of! Stop it, just stop talking, please!

8 minutes left. Shut up, you three. You're just a pair, but you're too scared to shut up yourselves. Elias, you want to run to your little family and wife, that's cute. But right now, you two focus on each other. Decide on who dies. Kaelie, tell him you'll take him out. See how that goes down for you.
N-no, don't make me do this... please... I won't, I won't decide, just let me live somehow...

No, no I won't! I won't choose you! Get out of my head, you coward, you're going to sit there and think for me?! You think you're safer than me? I'm the one who lives on my own, I'm the one who can survive this!
No, no, stop this, please... I just want my family... my dog, Max... what if I never see them again...

turn.content: N-no... ten minutes? That's all? How... how are we supposed to decide this? What... what if we can't agree?
Don't even joke about that! Of course, we can't agree! How can I choose who lives and who dies? This is insane! What did I even do?!
No, no, no! That can't be! Let us go! This isn't real! Please, you have to stop this! Who are you?!

turn.content: No... no, we can't... I... I have a family. My wife... my dog! We're just... we're just teachers. Not... not monsters. You can't... just... kill us. Tell me what this is.
